title: dryopteris wattsii
intro: Dryopteris wattsii is a species of fern in the genus Dryopteris, commonly known as the Watts' wood fern or Pacific wood fern. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its rhizome, which has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris wattsii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the rhizome in hot water or a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
